dominantLayer: fallback_clarification reached through missing intent families; generic local_status was the secondary policy-text leak

uiContext: Full Workroom and inline drawer now pass page id, section name, route, visible items, selected item, and available actions.

browser.detail: The app requires authenticated admin sign-in; no credentials were used or exposed.
